items.title: SIM card I am using
items.summary: A personal inventory of SIM cards across China (Mobile, Unicom, Telecom) and international options (CMHK, GiffGaff, PayGo, Globe) with pricing and use cases for number retention and service registration.

items.title: Rime on Mac Tutorial
items.summary: A comprehensive tutorial for setting up Rime (Squirrel) input method on macOS with the rime-ice dictionary, including WeChat keyboard themes and Dropbox-based vocabulary synchronization.

items.title: Himo Mini Program Security Issues
items.summary: A security research disclosure revealing an IDOR vulnerability in Himo (Haima Ti) photo studio's WeChat mini program that exposed customer order details and contact information through predictable order numbers.

items.title: U.S. Visa Waiting Time View
items.summary: Live U.S. visa interview wait times for selected embassies and consulates, refreshed every 3 hours from travel.state.gov.

items.title: Bank of China Hong Kong Account Opening Guide
items.summary: A detailed firsthand account of opening a Bank of China Hong Kong account as a mainland Chinese visitor, covering branch selection strategies, required documents, and tips for navigating the increasingly strict verification process.

items.title: Summary of University Life
items.summary: A reflective essay on four years of university life as a CS student in Shanghai, from early programming experiences and internships to the decision to pursue graduate studies in the United States.

items.title: Git Enable Commit Signing
items.summary: A quick guide to setting up GPG commit signing for Git and GitHub, including key generation, export, Git configuration, and VSCode integration.

items.title: Automatically update Homebrew versions using Action
items.summary: A tutorial on automating Homebrew formula updates using GitHub Actions, with shell scripts that fetch latest release versions and update SHA256 hashes automatically after each release.

items.title: Unlock ChatGPT with Cloudflare WARP
items.summary: A technical guide to bypassing ChatGPT IP restrictions using Cloudflare WARP as an IPv6 proxy, with XrayR/V2Ray configuration examples for routing OpenAI traffic through WARP.

items.title: I subscribed to ChatGPT Plus
items.summary: An early adopter's experience subscribing to ChatGPT Plus using a browser workaround, including tips on IP requirements for accessing OpenAI services and a self-developed OpenAI-Checker tool for verifying IP compatibility.

items.title: Create query API for 500 million Weibo data
items.summary: A technical guide to building a high-performance query API for the 500 million Weibo data leak using ClickHouse with dual tables indexed by UID and phone number for fast lookups.

items.title: Remove National Anti-Fraud Center on MIUI
items.summary: A tutorial on removing the pre-installed National Anti-Fraud Center app from MIUI devices using ADB commands or a Magisk module for rooted phones.

items.title: Bandwagonhost $99 THE PLAN
items.summary: A promotional post for Bandwagonhost's $99/year VPS plan featuring 2 CPU cores, 2GB RAM, 40GB SSD, 1TB monthly traffic, and access to premium data centers including Hong Kong and Japan Softbank.

items.title: Migrate from Gridea to Hexo
items.summary: Documentation of migrating from the abandoned Gridea blogging platform to Hexo, using the same Pure theme and switching from Disqus to Gitalk for comments.

items.title: 2022 year-end summary
items.summary: A satirical placeholder for a 2022 year-end summary, stating the content cannot be displayed due to relevant laws and regulations.

items.title: Add the English name to the passport
items.summary: A step-by-step guide to adding an English name to a Chinese passport through notarization and the Exit-Entry Administration Bureau, including required documents, costs, and timeline.

items.title: Spend $8 to buy Affinity Universial License
items.summary: A guide to purchasing Affinity Universal License at Argentina pricing (~$8 USD) through Microsoft Store by changing region settings and using Upwork to find someone with an Argentine payment method.

items.title: Twitter using NFT avatar
items.summary: A step-by-step tutorial for setting up a hexagonal NFT avatar on Twitter Blue using OpenSea, MetaMask, and Coinbase wallets, costing approximately $2 in ETH gas fees.

items.title: About WeChat Multi-opening on iOS
items.summary: A technical exploration of bypassing WeChat multi-open app activation codes through MITM request interception and brute-force code generation using multithreaded Python scripts.

items.title: Summary of low prices for subscription services
items.summary: A comprehensive guide to subscribing to services at regional prices, including Spotify Philippines, YouTube Premium Argentina, Netflix Pakistan, and Turkish App Store for apps like Surge, Telegram Premium, and iCloud.

items.title: Resigned from PwC
items.summary: A reflection on resigning from PwC AC Shanghai after just two weeks due to unexpected assignment to Salesforce development instead of preferred software engineering work.

items.title: Makes Google Voice permanent
items.summary: A step-by-step guide to permanently keeping a Google Voice number for $10 by purchasing a new number and using the legacy console to mark the old number as permanent, confirmed by Google support.

items.title: ASN Application | Use your own IP to access the Internet
items.summary: A comprehensive guide to applying for an ASN (AS206729) through RIPE, setting up BGP sessions with VPS providers like BuyVM using Bird, and configuring XrayR for custom IP routing to unlock regional services like Netflix Taiwan.

items.title: 2019 Hong Kong Travel
items.summary: A photo journal from a 2019 trip to Hong Kong, traveling by train from Jiaxing to Shenzhen and then by bus to Tuen Mun, staying at USA Hostel in Tsim Sha Tsui.
